records.ety: [Gr. <?/ time + <?/ writing, character: cf. F. chronogramme.]

defs: An inscription in which certain numeral letters, made to appear specially conspicuous, on being added together, express a particular date or epoch, as in the motto of a medal struck by Gustavus Adolphus in 1632: ChrIstVs DVX; ergo trIVMphVs. - the capitals of which give, when added as numerals, the sum 1632.
The record or inscription made by a chronograph.
